---
title: "Build Cohort"
author: "Julia Shoobe"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
```{r}
library(RODBC)
library(tidyverse)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)

function_files <- list.files("Pipeline Functions", pattern = "\\.R$", full.names = TRUE)
invisible(lapply(function_files, source))
```

```{r}
encounters <- read.csv("Datasets/encounters.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) |> 
  filter(ENCOUNTERID %in% validation_ids$ENCOUNTERID)

labs <- read.csv("Datasets/labs.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) |> 
  filter(ENCOUNTERID %in% validation_ids$ENCOUNTERID)

notes <- read.csv("Datasets/no_ceu_notes.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) |> 
  filter(ENCOUNTERID %in% validation_ids$ENCOUNTERID)
```

```{r}
cohort <- create_cohort(encounters, labs, notes)
```
